### ai-literacy-exemplar (L4 — assessed)

Full assessment from 2026-04-01. Go CLI tool built using the full
agent pipeline with authentic git history. 7/7 constraints enforced,
5/5 GC rules, spec-first workflow exercised on 2 features, compound
learning pipeline demonstrated end-to-end. Strongest discipline:
architectural constraints (5/5). Gaps: no cost data, operating cadence
not yet proven across a full quarter, no automated observability.

### ai-literacy-superpowers (L5 — estimated)

No prior assessment. Lightweight scan found:

- **L2**: 4 CI workflows (lint-markdown, harness, gc, pages)
- **L3**: CLAUDE.md, HARNESS.md (6 constraints, all enforced),
  AGENTS.md (8 entries), REFLECTION_LOG.md (6 entries), 22 skills,
  10 agents, 14 commands, hooks configured
- **L4**: 17 spec files in docs/superpowers/specs/
- **L5**: Plugin manifest (.claude-plugin/plugin.json), published
  marketplace plugin, cross-team templates, 7 article series

Estimated at L5 because it originates platform-level tooling (the
plugin itself), ships cross-team templates, and has organisational
governance documentation. However, this is an estimate — no clarifying
questions were asked about operating cadence, cost tracking, or OTel
configuration. A full `/assess` would refine this.
